bugbashSmokeBefore: failed; latest reproduction had 4 B26 issues, all parent POST /api/ai/suggestions 403 console errors. E99 historical B26 artifact recorded 6 same-root parent/mobile 403 console errors.

diagnosed403.consoleErrorSource: browser resource console error from 403 suggestions response
diagnosed403.conclusion: Normal parent home path sent an authorized child snapshot; route guard incorrectly treated snapshot.child.className as class scope.

diagnosed403.consoleErrorSource: browser resource console error from 403 suggestions response
diagnosed403.conclusion: Authorized child c-1 path was blocked before requireParentChildAccess could validate the intended child-scoped request.

diagnosed403.consoleErrorSource: browser resource console error from 403 suggestions response
diagnosed403.conclusion: Mobile parent smoke hit the same child-scoped suggestions request and failed because className was collected as class scope.

diagnosed403.conclusion: Duplicate mobile occurrence of the same route guard misclassification.

scopeChanges.change: Use authorizeAiRoute(request, { requiredRole: "parent", collectJsonClassNames: false }) for the parent suggestions route.
No change. Parent class-scope restrictions remain intact.
